scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w ui"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w ui
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w ui
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && electron-builder --win
